role.name: SUPER_ADMIN
role.description: Full platform access — manage all users, firms, settings, system config

role.name: ADMIN
role.description: Firm-level admin — manage users within their firm, create templates

role.name: IT_AUDITOR
role.description: Conducts ISO 27001 / DPDP / IT compliance audits

role.name: TAX_AUDITOR
role.description: Conducts GST / Income Tax / Tax compliance audits

role.name: COMPLIANCE_AUDITOR
role.description: General compliance auditor — all audit types

role.name: CA_FIRM_MANAGER
role.description: Manages a CA firm audit portfolio and assigns auditors

role.name: CLIENT_VIEWER
role.description: Read-only access to view own audit status and reports
